# Waypoint Journeys

> Luxury adventure travel to the world's last wild places. Small-group expeditions with a maximum of 5 guests per trip.

## About

Waypoint Journeys is a luxury adventure travel company specializing in hand-crafted expeditions to off-the-beaten-path destinations. Every trip is bespoke, with a maximum group size of 5 guests, ensuring an intimate and personalized experience. We provide 24/7 on-the-ground support, expert local guides, and curated itineraries that go far beyond the guidebook.

- Website: https://wpjourneys.com
- Email: info@wpjourneys.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/waypoint.journeys
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/waypointjourneys

## Expeditions

### 4 Stans of Central Asia — Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Tajikistan & Uzbekistan
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/central-asia-expedition/
- Duration: 18 days / 17 nights (Almaty to Tashkent; optional Turkmenistan extension)
- Price: From $5,995 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Almaty, Charyn Canyon, Kolsay & Kaindy Lakes, Karakol, Jety-Oguz, eagle hunters at Bokonbaevo, felt-making at Kochkor, Bishkek, Tashkent, Khujand, Istaravshan, Penjikent & the Seven Lakes, Samarkand (Registan), Bukhara, Khiva
- Description: An 18-day expedition across four Central Asian countries on one Silk Road arc from Almaty to Tashkent — Kazakhstan's Charyn Canyon and drowned forests, Kyrgyzstan's eagle hunters and felt-makers, Tajikistan's ancient Sogdiana and Seven Lakes, and Uzbekistan's Samarkand, Bukhara, and Khiva. Four border crossings, two domestic flights, and a high-speed train, all handled. An optional Turkmenistan extension continues from Khiva (combined: six countries, 24 days). Max 5 guests.

### Where the Volcanoes Meet — Burundi, Rwanda, Uganda & the DRC Border
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/gorilla-expedition/
- Duration: 10 days / 9 nights (Bujumbura to Entebbe)
- Price: From $3,995 per person (luxury, all permits included)
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Lake Tanganyika & Burundi, Rwanda mountain gorilla trek (Volcanoes NP), golden monkeys, Lake Kivu, Nyiragongo lava lake summit (DRC, conditional), Mt Sabyinyo three-country peak (Uganda), Bwindi gorilla trek, Queen Elizabeth NP & Kazinga Channel
- Description: A 10-day expedition across the Albertine Rift through four countries — mountain gorillas in Rwanda's Volcanoes NP and Uganda's Bwindi, golden monkeys, the active Nyiragongo lava lake, and the summit of Mt Sabyinyo where Uganda, Rwanda, and the DRC share a single point. The DRC/Nyiragongo component sits in North Kivu and is conditional on confirmed safe access at time of travel, with a full Rwanda/Uganda substitution available; the Mt Sabyinyo summit requires no DRC entry. All gorilla, monkey, and volcano permits included. Max 4 guests.

### Best of the Maya Corridor — El Salvador, Guatemala & Honduras
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/maya-corridor-expedition/
- Duration: 7 days / 6 nights (San Salvador to Copán)
- Price: From $2,295 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Santa Ana (Ilamatepec) crater lake & Cerro Verde, colonial Antigua, the Acatenango overnight volcano hike beside erupting Volcán de Fuego, the Black Christ basilica of Esquipulas, Copán Maya ruins & Hieroglyphic Stairway, Macaw Mountain
- Description: Seven days across three countries — western El Salvador, eastern Guatemala, and the Copán valley in Honduras. The route runs a horseshoe from San Salvador through the Santa Ana crater, colonial Antigua, the centrepiece Acatenango overnight hike beside the erupting Volcán de Fuego, the Black Christ pilgrimage basilica of Esquipulas, and the carved Maya city of Copán. Two land border crossings handled. The Acatenango hike is demanding (1,570m ascent); an opt-out is available. Max 5 guests.

### The Middle Kingdom — China Luxury Expedition
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/china-expedition/
- Duration: 14 days / 13 nights (Chengdu to Beijing)
- Price: From $8,995 per person (private, luxury, fully guided)
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Chengdu giant pandas, Chongqing (the vertical city), Wulong Karst, Kunming Stone Forest, Dali & Erhai Lake, Guilin & Longji rice terraces, Li River cruise, Fenghuang ancient town, Zhangjiajie Avatar mountains, Xi'an Terracotta Army, Beijing Forbidden City & Great Wall
- Description: A 14-day private, fully-guided luxury expedition across the greatest contrasts in Asia — pandas in Chengdu, the three-dimensional city of Chongqing, the karst of Yunnan and Guilin, the Avatar peaks of Zhangjiajie, the Terracotta Army of Xi'an, and the Forbidden City and Great Wall of Beijing. Travel by first-class high-speed rail and private domestic flights, with a resident guide in every city. Max 5 guests.

### Rome, Sand & the Maghreb — Tunisia & Algeria Expedition
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/tunisia-algeria-expedition/
- Duration: Two companion 8-day expeditions (Tunisia 8 days, Algeria 8 days; combinable to 16 days)
- Price: Tunisia from $2,295; Algeria from $2,495; combined $4,495 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Tunisia: Tunis Medina & Bardo Museum, Carthage, Sidi Bou Said, Dougga, Kairouan, El Jem amphitheatre, Tozeur & the Sahara, Matmata, Djerba. Algeria: Casbah of Algiers, Tipaza, Djemila, Constantine (City of Bridges), Timgad, Sétif
- Description: Two companion expeditions across the two halves of the ancient Roman province of Africa. Tunisia (8 days) runs from the Medina to the Sahara via Carthage, Dougga, El Jem, and the Berber south. Algeria (8 days) covers the Roman north — Tipaza, Djemila, Timgad, and the gorge-city of Constantine — plus the Casbah of Algiers. Among the finest preserved and least-visited Roman cities on Earth. Algeria requires a licensed guide and visa (LOI provided). Max 5 guests.

### The Forgotten Coast — Guyana & Suriname Expedition
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/guianas-expedition/
- Duration: 6 days / 5 nights (Georgetown to Paramaribo)
- Price: From $2,495 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Kaieteur Falls by private charter, Georgetown, UNESCO-listed Paramaribo, Courantyne River border crossing, Amazonian ecolodge & river journey, Maroon community, Bigi Pan birding, caiman night spotting
- Description: Six days through the most overlooked corner of South America — Kaieteur Falls (a single 226m plunge, five times the height of Niagara) by private charter, the UNESCO colonial capital of Paramaribo, and a motor-canoe journey into the undisturbed Surinamese interior with Maroon villages and world-class birding. Runs standalone or as a 19-day combination with the Caribbean Arc from Port of Spain. Max 5 guests.

### The Last Atolls — Central Pacific Island Expedition
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/pacific-expedition/
- Duration: 15 days / 14 nights (Fiji to Honolulu)
- Price: From $3,495 per person (excludes international flights)
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Funafuti (Tuvalu), Tarawa WWII battlefield (Kiribati), Nauru phosphate moonscape, Majuro & Marshallese stick charts, the United Airlines Island Hopper, Nan Madol megalithic site (Pohnpei, Micronesia)
- Description: Fifteen days east-to-west across the central Pacific — five of the world's least-visited nations linked by the Nauru Airlines network and the United Airlines Island Hopper (a single Boeing 737 crossing the Date Line and equator), ending at Nan Madol, the ancient basalt stone city of ninety-two artificial islands off Pohnpei. Built backward from confirmed Island Hopper departures; book 3-4 months ahead. Max 5 guests.

### Bhutan — Best of the Thunder Dragon Kingdom
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/bhutan-expedition/
- Duration: 7 days / 6 nights (optional 8-day Bumdra extension)
- Price: From $3,795 per person (excludes mandatory Bhutan government fees of $740/adult)
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Tiger's Nest (Paro Taktsang), optional Bumdra ridge trek, hot stone bath, farmer's dinner, Thimphu (Buddha Dordenma, Tashichho Dzong), Dochula Pass, Sopsokha Fertility Village & Chimi Lhakhang, Punakha Dzong, Khamsum Yulley Chorten, black-necked cranes & Gangtey Monastery in Phobjika
- Description: Seven days across Bhutan at the unhurried pace the country demands — the Tiger's Nest monastery, a traditional hot stone bath and farmer's dinner, the temples and dzongs of Thimphu and Punakha, the Dochula Pass, the phallus-painted Fertility Village, and the wintering grounds of the sacred black-necked crane. Note: Bhutan's mandatory Sustainable Development Fee ($100/person/night) and $40 visa fee are paid separately to the Bhutan Tourism Council.

### Egypt Off the Map
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/egypt-expedition/
- Duration: 7 days / 6 nights
- Price: From $3,495 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Islamic & Coptic Cairo, Garbage City (Manshiyat Naser) & the cave church of St Simon, Nile overnight sleeper train, Luxor Valley of the Kings, Karnak, felucca on the Nile, Edfu, Nubian village, Temple of Philae, Aswan High Dam, Abu Simbel, the Unfinished Obelisk
- Description: Seven days through the Egypt the package tours skip: the medieval and Coptic layers of Cairo, the Zabaleen recycling district and its cliff-carved cave church, the overnight sleeper train south, Luxor's west and east banks, a felucca down the Nile, the Nubian south at Aswan, and the rock-cut temples of Abu Simbel at the edge of Lake Nasser.

### Bangladesh
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/bangladesh-expedition/
- Duration: 7 days / 6 nights
- Price: From $1,695 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Old Dhaka and Buriganga river, Sreemangal tea gardens, Lawachara rainforest (hoolock gibbons), Khasia village, overnight launch from Dhaka to Barisal, Barisal floating markets, Bagerhat (UNESCO — Sixty Dome Mosque), Sonargaon, Panam Nagar, Meghna river sunset
- Description: Seven days through one of South Asia's most-overlooked countries. Old Dhaka's medieval medina, the emerald tea hills of Sreemangal, an overnight river launch through the inland delta to Barisal's floating markets, the 15th-century UNESCO ruins of Bagerhat, and the abandoned colonial mansions of Panam Nagar.

### Socotra Island, Yemen — April 21–27, 2026
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/socotra/
- Duration: 7 days
- Price: From $2,950 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Dragon's Blood Trees, Hoq Cave, Detwah Lagoon, Shu'ab Beach, UNESCO World Heritage biodiversity
- Description: Explore the "Galápagos of the Indian Ocean" — one of the most isolated and biodiverse places on Earth. Camp under the stars, trek through alien landscapes, and discover species found nowhere else.

### Ghana, Benin & Togo — May 2–9, 2026
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/west-africa-expedition/
- Duration: 8 days
- Price: From $2,950 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Voodoo temples of Ouidah, Cape Coast & Elmina slave castles, Ganvié stilt village, Abomey royal palaces, Accra city tour
- Description: Journey across three West African nations at the crossroads of history. Experience Voodoo ceremonies, walk the halls of slave castles, float through Africa's Venice, and explore vibrant coastal capitals.

### Mongolia — July 4–21, 2026
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/mongolia-expedition/
- Duration: 11 to 17 nights (flexible itinerary)
- Price: From $4,950 per person (11 nights) / $5,950 (14 nights) / $7,450 (17 nights)
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Naadam Festival, Golden Eagle Hunters in Olgii, Gobi Desert (Flaming Cliffs, Khongor Sand Dunes), Terelj National Park, Karakorum ruins, nomadic ger camps
- Description: Cross the Mongolian steppe from the Altai Mountains to the Gobi Desert. Experience the legendary Naadam Festival, ride with Kazakh eagle hunters, sleep in nomadic ger camps, and discover ancient empires.

### Pakistan Karakoram — October 15–27, 2026
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/pakistan-expedition/
- Duration: 13 days
- Price: From $3,695 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Karakoram Highway, Hunza Valley autumn foliage, Lahore's Mughal heritage, Skardu, Attabad Lake, Passu Cones, Wagah Border ceremony
- Description: Travel the Karakoram Highway through the most dramatic mountain landscapes on Earth. From Lahore's Mughal splendour to Hunza Valley's golden autumn, this expedition reveals Pakistan's extraordinary beauty and hospitality.

### Turkmenistan
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/turkmenistan-expedition/
- Duration: 7 days
- Price: From $3,495 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Darvaza Gas Crater (Door to Hell), Ancient Merv (UNESCO), Konye-Urgench (UNESCO), white-marble Ashgabat, Yangykala Canyon, Old Nisa, Nokhur villages
- Description: Seven days across the strangest country in Central Asia. Sleep on the rim of the Darvaza Gas Crater, walk Silk Road ruins, drive into the striped cliffs of Yangykala, and end among the white-marble boulevards of Ashgabat.

### Madagascar
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/madagascar-expedition/
- Duration: 7 days (optional 9 days with Tsingy extension)
- Price: From $2,750 per person ($2,950 with 2-day Tsingy de Bemaraha extension)
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Lemurs' Park, Kirindy Forest by night, Avenue of the Baobabs at sunset, Sacred Baobab of Marofandilia, Zazamalala and Kimony reserves, Peyrieras, Andasibe-Mantadia rainforest and the indri, optional Tsingy de Bemaraha (UNESCO)
- Description: Seven days across the Eighth Continent. Meet lemurs at five reserves, watch the Avenue of the Baobabs throw hundred-metre shadows at sunset, walk Kirindy Forest by night in search of the fossa, and end at the dawn chorus of the indri in the Andasibe rainforest. Optional 2-day Tsingy de Bemaraha extension.

### Libya
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/libya-expedition/
- Duration: 2, 3, 5, or 8 nights (four options)
- Price: From $1,195 per person (2-night) · $1,395 (3-night) · $1,795 (5-night, most popular) · $2,795 (8-night, includes 2 domestic flights)
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Leptis Magna (UNESCO), Sabratha (UNESCO), Tripoli Old City, Gharyan troglodyte homes, Nafusa Mountains (Qasr Al-Haj, Nalut, Kabaw, Tarmisa), Ghadames oasis (UNESCO), Tadrart Acacus prehistoric rock art (UNESCO), Maghadet dunes, Ubari Lakes
- Description: Four ways to experience Libya, from a long weekend at the Roman cities to a nine-day Sahara expedition. Two of the most complete Roman cities in the Mediterranean, the Berber Nafusa mountains, the UNESCO Ghadames oasis, and — on the deepest itinerary — the prehistoric rock art of the Tadrart Acacus with three nights of desert camping.

### Syria
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/syria-expedition/
- Duration: 10 days / 9 nights
- Price: From $2,950 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Old City of Damascus (UNESCO), Umayyad Mosque, Mount Qasioun, Bosra (UNESCO), Maaloula (Aramaic monastery), Saidnaya, Deir Mar Musa, Krak des Chevaliers (UNESCO), Tartus and Arwad island, Amrit Phoenician ruins, Palmyra (UNESCO), Homs, Hama's waterwheels, Masyaf Castle of the Assassins, Apamea's Roman colonnade, Old City of Aleppo (UNESCO), Citadel, traditional Aleppo soap factory
- Description: Ten days from Beirut, across the Levant, and back. The reopening of organised travel to Syria — six UNESCO World Heritage cities, the oldest continuously inhabited capital on Earth (Damascus), Aramaic prayer in the mountain monasteries, the great Crusader fortress, the return of Palmyra, and the medieval souks of Aleppo. Beirut–Damascus–Beirut by road; all security clearance and permits handled.

### Mauritania
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/mauritania-expedition/
- Duration: 8 days
- Price: From $2,950 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Chinguetti's stone libraries, Adrar Plateau, Sahara dunes, the Iron Ore Train, Ben Amera monolith, Cabo Blanco
- Description: Eight days across the Adrar, the dunes, and the Atlantic Sahara. Walk the medieval libraries of Chinguetti, ride one of the longest trains in the world, and finish at the last refuge of the Mediterranean monk seal.

### Eritrea
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/eritrea-expedition/
- Duration: 5 days
- Price: From $2,450 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Asmara's modernist architecture (UNESCO), Massawa Red Sea coast, Keren's Monday camel market
- Description: Five days through a country almost nobody has been to. Asmara is UNESCO's newest world heritage city — the finest collection of early modernist architecture on Earth.

### Myanmar
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/myanmar-expedition/
- Duration: 15 days
- Price: From $3,950 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Bagan temple plain at sunrise, hot air balloons, U Bein teak bridge, Inle Lake floating villages, Pindaya Buddha caves, Yangon Shwedagon Pagoda
- Description: Fifteen days across the temple plains, floating villages, and golden pagodas of Burma. Drift silently at sunrise across two thousand temples, then end at Yangon's golden Shwedagon Pagoda.

## Key Facts

- Maximum 5 guests per expedition
- Bespoke, hand-crafted itineraries
- 24/7 on-the-ground support
- Expert local guides
- Price range: $2,450–$7,450 per person
- Destinations: Bangladesh, Eritrea, Ghana, Benin, Togo, Libya, Madagascar, Mauritania, Mongolia, Myanmar, Pakistan, Socotra (Yemen), Syria, Turkmenistan
- All trips include accommodation, internal transport, guided activities, and most meals
- Bilingual website: English and Simplified Chinese (中文)
